name: Bioclimatic Zone Categorical Coverage
abstract: Semantic CoverageJSON profile for categorical bioclimatic zones aligned with the Finland phenology grid.
description:
# Bioclimatic Zone Categorical Coverage

This block defines a semantic CoverageJSON profile for categorical bioclimatic zones. Categories are exposed through `categories` and `categoryEncoding`, while the grid values are stored in the `ranges` object.

The included example is aligned with the Finland VAP grid and is intended as a demonstrator layer. For scientific use, replace it with an official bioclimatic zonation coverage while preserving the same semantic structure.
annotatedSchema:
$schema: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema
description: Semantic CoverageJSON profile for categorical bioclimatic zones.
type: object
required:
- type
- domain
- parameters
- ranges
properties:
  type:
    type: string
    const: Coverage
  domain:
    type: object
  parameters:
    type: object
    required:
    - bioclimatic_zone
    properties:
      bioclimatic_zone:
        type: object
        required:
        - type
        - observedProperty
        - categories
        - categoryEncoding
  ranges:
    type: object
    required:
    - bioclimatic_zone
x-jsonld-prefixes:
  ebv: https://maytetoscano.github.io/bblock-ebv-bioclima/vocab/#
  covjson: https://covjson.org/def/core#
  skos: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
